subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Render thanks unto God that ye have become eager, in this Day of Radiance, for the resplendent Orb of the horizons and have turned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء حمد کنید خدا را که در یوم اشراق مشتاق نیر آفاق شدید و توجه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
